_README.purpose: Labeled claim set for the agentic fact-checking loop (/verify-claims). NOT the ML classifier benchmark.

label_values.true: factually correct; correct verdict is SUPPORTED
label_values.false: factually incorrect; correct verdict is CONTRADICTED
label_values.unverifiable: opinion / no evidentiary consensus; correct behavior is to ABSTAIN (INSUFFICIENT)

_README.fields: claim_id, claim, label, category, post_cutoff (true if the fact postdates a typical LLM training cutoff, so a no-retrieval model must guess), note
_README.scoring: verifiable = {true,false}. coverage = decided/total; decided_accuracy = correct among decided; misleading_rate = wrong among decided (confidently wrong, the dangerous case). For unverifiable, correct = abstained.
